game.startHint: Click to enter the driving experience

controls.title: Controls
controls.hintDesktop: Use WASD or arrow keys. Space to brake, Shift to boost.
controls.hintMobile: Use the on-screen buttons to drive.

game.fallback: Your browser does not support WebGL, so the 3D world cannot be shown. You can still explore all the content below.
game.prefersReducedMotion: Reduced-motion mode is on — the 3D world is disabled for your comfort.

hero.title: We drive your business growth
hero.subtitle: From property and automotive to retail, F&B, education, and more — we help business owners grow with websites, apps, and digital products.
hero.note: Click the 3D world or press WASD to explore how we help your business.

sectionsIntro.title: Everything your business needs to grow
sectionsIntro.subtitle: Product, design, and growth — delivered by one integrated team.

industries.title: Experienced in your industry
industries.subtitle: We tailor the strategy to the character and customers of each industry.

property.title: Property
property.desc: Help agents & developers sell units faster with high-quality leads.

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.desc: Drive test-drives, servicing, and sales for dealers & workshops.

retail.title: Retail & F&B
retail.desc: Fill stores, restaurants, and cafés with loyal new customers.

services.title: Services & Health
services.desc: Keep clinics, salons, and service providers booked consistently.

education.title: Education
education.desc: Help schools, courses, and learning platforms reach more students.

startup.title: Startup & Tech
startup.desc: Turn ideas into products — from MVP to a scale-ready platform.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Travel
hospitality.desc: Boost bookings for hotels, cafés, and travel businesses.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.desc: Digitize operations and tracking for logistics & delivery businesses.

how.title: Grow in three steps
how.step1Body: We study your business, market, and competitors to build a clear growth roadmap.
how.step2Body: Our creative and media teams run campaigns on the channels that fit you best.
how.step3Body: We optimize on data and scale what is proven to deliver results.

cta.title: Ready to drive your business growth?
cta.subtitle: A free consultation to map out your marketing opportunities.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.body: We build fast, secure, and easy-to-manage websites, web apps, and online stores (e-commerce) — complete with payment integration and a smooth checkout.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.body: Research, wireframes, and interface design that make your product easy and delightful to use.

automation.title: Automation & Integrations
automation.body: Payment gateway, CRM, and tooling integrations plus workflow automation so your team runs efficiently.

seo.title: SEO & Website
seo.body: A fast website that converts, plus SEO so your business shows up at the top of search.

branding.title: Branding & Creative
branding.body: Visual identity, messaging, and creative assets that make your brand stand out in its market.

analytics.title: Analytics & Leads
analytics.body: Tracking, dashboards, and funnel optimization so every marketing dollar is measurable.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: The story, mission, and values of Brand Drive as a web & digital product studio.

hero.title: A digital product partner for business owners
hero.subtitle: Our mission: make high-quality websites, apps, and digital products accessible to every business, whatever the industry.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: Brand Drive was born from one belief: every business owner deserves a website and digital products that actually work, not just look good.
story.body2: Since 2024 we have helped businesses across many industries build a digital presence that is fast, clean, and easy to manage.

values.title: The values we hold
values.reliabilityBody: We are measured by real outcomes: products that get used and businesses that grow.
values.transparencyBody: Open progress and pricing. You always know the status of your work.
values.securityBody: We work like part of your team, not a distant vendor.
values.craftBody: Details matter — clean code and thoughtfully designed interfaces.

meta.title: Trust
meta.description: Brand Drive's security, privacy, ownership, and transparency practices.

hero.title: Safe, transparent, and fully yours
hero.subtitle: We protect the security, privacy, and full ownership of your project's code and data.

intro.title: How we keep your trust
intro.body: Trust is built on clear practices. Here are the principles we hold to on every project.

security.title: Secure Practices
security.desc: Secure development: HTTPS, encryption, dependency updates, and prevention of common vulnerabilities.

dataprotection.title: Data Protection
dataprotection.desc: We follow data-protection principles (such as PDPA & GDPR) when handling your project data.

ownership.title: Full Ownership
ownership.desc: You own the code, design, and all assets. No vendor lock-in.

uptime.title: Uptime & Backups
uptime.desc: Availability monitoring and regular backups so your service stays reliable.

transparency.title: Transparent Communication
transparency.desc: Open progress, decisions, and costs — nothing hidden.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality & NDA
confidentiality.desc: Your business information and ideas are kept fully confidential.

disclaimer.title: Note
disclaimer.body: This page describes our working practices and is provided for informational purposes. Adjust it to your official policy before publishing.

meta.title: Contact Us
meta.description: Talk to the Brand Drive team about growing your business.

hero.title: Let's talk about your growth
hero.subtitle: Tell us about your business — we'll reply with concrete ideas and next steps within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business & goals…

errors.messageShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.

success.title: Message sent!
success.body: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will reply shortly.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How Brand Drive collects, uses, and protects your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it. (Sample text — replace with your official policy.)
privacy.s1Body: We collect data you provide directly, project data, and technical data such as IP address and browser type.
privacy.s2Body: Data is used to run the service, deliver projects, meet legal obligations, and improve our products.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal data. It is shared only with trusted service providers as operationally required.
privacy.s4Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data in line with applicable regulations.
privacy.s5Body: For privacy questions, reach us via the contact page.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: The terms that govern the use of Brand Drive's services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using our services you agree to the following terms. (Sample text — replace with your official terms.)
terms.s1Body: You agree to use the service lawfully and not to misuse it in any way.
terms.s2Body: The scope, deliverables, and project timelines are described in your proposal or agreement.
terms.s3Body: Service fees are described in your agreement. Changes will be communicated in advance.
terms.s4Body: We do our best work, but project outcomes can be affected by factors beyond our control. Liability is limited to the extent permitted by law.
terms.s5Body: We may update these terms from time to time and will note the update date.

footer.tagline: The agency that drives your brand's growth.
footer.disclaimer: We turn ideas into fast, reliable digital products — and help your business grow.

notFound.title: Looks like you took a wrong turn
notFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for could not be found.
